title: Oskukana Mod Folder
description: A lightweight modpack built for smooth and competitive PvP, with optimizations tailored for Crystal PvP and fast-paced combat while staying close to vanilla.
body:
oskukana Crystal PvP Modpack is a performance-focused Minecraft modpack designed specifically for Crystal PvP combat. It includes optimizations to improve FPS and reduce lag, along with PvP-oriented quality-of-life mods that enhance visibility, responsiveness, and overall gameplay. The goal of this pack is to provide players with a smooth, competitive environment tailored for dueling and practicing Crystal PvP.

I have no affilation with any of the mods inside this mod pack.

**This modpack is fully allowed on vtl!!**

**53%** more fps than on vanilla minecraft (_this may vary inbetween different computer specs_)

**37%** more fps than on other crystal pvp modpacks
Max settings used on every test


## **PvPPrac.EU cpvp prac server**
